text: I sense the contrast between the cool sterility of the glass meeting room and the vibrant, experimental atmosphere of the R+D space. Here, amid displays exploring human and machine interaction, I feel a mixture of curiosity and wonder, and perhaps a gentle agitation. This place is an invitation to contemplate the intersection of technology and humanity—a museum, perhaps, urging me to examine the future's uncertainties. It is both orderly and filled with potential, and I feel myself drawn inward, reflecting on my own place within this shifting landscape.
